id.title: Main Board Game Bareng
id.description: Pilih dari ratusan koleksi board game dan mainkan sepuasnya bareng keluarga, teman, atau pasangan.

id.title: Dipandu Game Master
id.description: Baru pertama main atau bingung aturannya? Game master kami siap merekomendasikan dan mengajarkan cara bermain.

id.title: Ngobrol & Nongkrong Santai
id.description: Gak cuma main game, kamu juga bisa nongkrong santai sambil ngobrol seru bareng orang-orang terdekat.

id.title: Nikmati Makanan & Minuman
id.description: Sambil main atau nongkrong, manjakan diri dengan pilihan makanan dan minuman dari menu Gatherloop.

id.title: Rayakan Momen Spesial
id.description: Ulang tahun, gathering komunitas, atau sekadar kumpul bareng — rayakan momen spesialmu di Gatherloop.

en.title: Play Board Games Together
en.description: Choose from hundreds of board games and play as much as you like with family, friends, or your partner.

en.title: Get Guided by a Game Master
en.description: New to a game or unsure about the rules? Our game masters are happy to recommend one and teach you how to play.

en.title: Hang Out and Chat
en.description: It's not just about the games — you can also relax and catch up with the people who matter to you.

en.title: Enjoy Food & Drinks
en.description: While you play or hang out, treat yourself to a bite and a drink from the Gatherloop menu.

en.title: Celebrate Special Moments
en.description: A birthday, a community gathering, or just a get-together — celebrate your special moments at Gatherloop.
